title: Bravo Seven
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bravo Seven''' was the callsign given to a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo Squadron]] during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

[[Essara Till/Legends|Essara Till]] served as Bravo Seven prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. She was killed in a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] attack while protecting [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] after a failed negotiation with the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

==Appearances==
